hero.title:
Prove that 
 your MRR is real
hero.subtitle: Turn your revenue into proof that investors and clients buy immediately.

cards.title: Total Mistrust
cards.description: You brag about your MRR with screenshots and nobody believes you.

cards.title: Extreme Irrelevance
cards.description: You don't appear on any leading platforms in Spanish.

cards.title: No Alternatives
cards.description: Out there they only handle Stripe and not your gateway to show your MRR.

cards.title: Real Credibility
cards.description: Your MRR will be public and verifiable. You will have a certificate of your results.

cards.title: Boosted SEO
cards.description: You will be linked by a relevant page. Free improved SEO!

cards.title: Deep Analysis
cards.description: You have a library of your competition at your fingertips, and their results!

steps.title: Register your startup
steps.description: Add your startup totally free in one click. Become a recognized founder or stay anonymous.

steps.title: Set your read-only API key
steps.description: To make the data real, we will bring it directly from your payment gateway securely.

steps.title: Brag about your new backlink
steps.description: That's it. Share on your social networks that a professional site is linking to you alongside your real results.

questions.question: Do I have to provide my payment gateway API key?
questions.answer: Yes, to verify your startup's real revenue, data will be taken from your payment gateway. This is completely secure because it will be a read-only API, meaning nothing else can be done except viewing that data.

questions.question: Why will this increase my organic traffic?
questions.answer: When a website is externally linked by a relevant page, Google considers it an indicator of quality and relevance. This can increase your site's organic traffic.

questions.question: What metrics will be public on my profile?
questions.answer: You can decide whether to attach your social networks or stay private. For your startup, its monthly recurring revenue (MRR) and monthly traffic will be shown.

questions.question: What do I gain by registering my startup here?
questions.answer: You will gain credibility, completely free impressions from Facto.saas users, and media relevance.

success.title: Request sent
success.subtitle: We will contact you soon with your access details.
